page_content:
KNES601 Epidemiology of Physical Activity (3 Credits)

An exploration of basic epidemiological study design, methods, and health outcomes in the field of physical activity.

Prerequisite: KNES600; and must have completed an undergraduate statistics course (e.g., STAT100 or equivalent).

KNES602 Physical Activity Program Planning and Evaluation (3 Credits) An in-depth analysis of the planning, implementation, and evaluation of physical activity interventions and programs intended to achieve physical activity and public health goals.
